zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gleason於1637年1月21日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福時，他的父親Thomas Gleason III28歲，母親Susanna Page16歲。他和Sarah Gleason至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1705年7月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年68歲，埋葬在美國緬因州薩默塞特坎布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Gleason于1637年1月21日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福时，他的父亲Thomas Gleason III28岁，母亲Susanna Page16岁。他和Sarah Gleason至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1705年7月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年68岁，埋葬在美国缅因州薩默塞特坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Gleason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Waterford): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glasáin, from a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’.

variants.name: Glasheen
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glaisín,based on a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’. Compare Gleason .

variants.name: Glisan
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Gleason  . This surname is concentrated in IL and PA.

variants.name: Gleeson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Siobhan, Brendan, Conor.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gleason was born on 21 January 1637, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Gleason III, was 28 and his mother, Susanna Page, was 16. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Sarah Gleason. He died on 25 July 1705, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Cambridge, Somerset, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gleason est né le 21 janvier 1637, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Gleason III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Susanna Page, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Sarah Gleason. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1705, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Cambridge, Somerset, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Gleason am 21. Januar 1637 in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Gleason III 28 und seine Mutter Susanna Page 16. Er hatte mit Sarah Gleason mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1705 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cambridge, Somerset, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gleason è nato il il 21 gennaio 1637 nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Gleason III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Page, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Sarah Gleason. Morì il 25 luglio 1705, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Cambridge, Somerset, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gleasonが1637年1月21日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブで生まれた時，父Thomas Gleason IIIは28歳，母Susanna Pageは16歳であった。彼はSarah Gleasonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1705年7月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ソメルセトカンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gleason(이)가 1637년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Gleason III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Page(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Sarah Gleason(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1705년 7월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 서머세트 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gleason nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1637, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Gleason III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Page, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Sarah Gleason. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1705, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Cambridge, Somerset, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gleason родился 21 января 1637 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Gleason III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Page, 16. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Sarah Gleason. Он умер 25 июля 1705 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности камбридж, сомирсет, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Gleason nació el 21 de enero de 1637, en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Gleason III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Susanna Page, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Sarah Gleason. Murió el 25 de julio de 1705, en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Cambridge, Somerset, Maine, Estados Unidos.
